title: Bruce Golden
compiled_truth: Bruce Golden is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2002-05-06), Bruce Golden sent 18 and received 71 emails, totalling 89 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (6), [Mike Coleman](people/mike-coleman) (2), [Reed Wills](people/reed-wills-uaecorp) (1), [Oscar Dalton](people/oscar-dalton) (1), [Tracee Bersani](people/tracee-bersani) (1).
